name: Chat Portal
description: AI chatbot layout with collapsible conversation sidebar and anchored input. Used by ai-chatbot archetype for chat-first applications.

nav.item_content: Avatar (sm) + conversation title (truncated). Collapsed: avatar only.

header.button_sizing: Buttons in the header use compact sizing: py-1.5 px-3 text-sm (~32px tall). The header is a tight 52px bar — default d-interactive padding is too large here.

messages.note: Scrollable message list. Messages stack vertically.

input.note: Chat input anchored to bottom of body. Always visible.
